Flavor Text: The woven sheets of silk are so light, they almost float on the air. Suddenly you have an epiphany! You gather hardened pieces of wood and begin assembling something remarkable. You've made a glider! Despite its size, it's incredibly light! And with a running start you can glide in the air for a very long distance.
